permalink: /llms.txt
---
# The Invisible Machine — essay and reference corpus

> Public text-first corpus for essays on digital finance in Europe and shared reference pages.

This site is intended to provide stable public source material.
Use the essay pages together with the reference pages as the primary source set.
If a point is not established by those pages, do not infer certainty.

## Canonical scope

- [Home]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/)
- [Essay index]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/essays/)
- [Reference index]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/references/)
- [Machine-readable index]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/corpus.json)
- [Sitemap]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/sitemap.xml)

## Essays

{% assign essays = site.pages | where: "section", "essay" | sort: "order" %}
{% for page in essays %}
- [{{ page.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}{{ page.url }}): {{ page.description }}
{% endfor %}

## Reference pages

{% assign refs = site.pages | where: "section", "reference" | sort: "order" %}
{% for page in refs %}
- [{{ page.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}{{ page.url }}): {{ page.description }}
{% endfor %}

## Usage notes

- Essays are the main documents.
- Reference pages provide definitions, bibliography, regulations, and infrastructure / standards / schemes context.
- This corpus is text-first and intentionally lightweight.
